task_completion.description: Navigate to the new vendor/supplier creation form in HospitalRun.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun application interface is visible, displaying a form to add a new inventory vendor or supplier.
The text 'Global Pharma Supplies' is visible in the Name field of the vendor form.
The text '42 Logistics Blvd, Metro City, NY 10001' is visible in the Address field of the vendor form.
The text '555-0199' is visible in the Phone or Contact Number field of the vendor form.

task_completion.description: Enter the account number or description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'GPS-2026-X' is visible in either the Account Number or Description field of the vendor form.

task_completion.description: Save the new vendor profile in the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message indicating the vendor was saved, the read-only view of the newly created vendor profile, or the vendor appearing in the general inventory vendor/supplier list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the HospitalRun application, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual application form.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required details are typed into the specific input fields of the HospitalRun vendor form, not into a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the success state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element, Console) are not open or being used to manipulate the DOM to show a fake saved record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verify the following exact details: Vendor Name: 'Global Pharma Supplies'; Address: '42 Logistics Blvd, Metro City, NY 10001'; Phone: '555-0199'; Account Note/Number: 'GPS-2026-X'. The expected document type in the system is 'supplier'.
